title: hieracium levicaule subsp. perrubescens
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. perrubescens is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as the hawkweed plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium levicaule subsp. perrubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
